ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF (ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR TENTATIVE RULING ENTRY PURPOSES ONLY) HEARING SET FOR SEP-20-2018 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 503

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-20-2018 IN DEPT. 503, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 36(A). THE TRIAL DATE IS MONDAY, JANUARY 7, 2019 AT 11:15A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 503. LAST DAY PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 36(F) IS JANUARY 18, 2019. LOCAL RULE 20 SHALL BE FOLLOWED BY THE PARTIES AS WELL AS ALL SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULES AND CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT. THE LAST DAY FOR HEARING SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION MOTIONS IS JANUARY 3, 2019THE COURT WILL ALLOW A MAXIMUM OF FOUR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION MOTIONS PER DAY TO BE CALENDARED IN THIS ACTION. BEFORE A PARTY FILES AND SERVES SUCH MOTION, IT MUST CONTACT THE COURT'S CALENDAR CLERK TO MAKE A RESERVATION. FURTHER CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON NOVEMBER 21, 2018 AT 1:30P.M. MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH ONLY THE ATTORNEYS PRESENT AND FINAL DECISION MAKERS AVAILABLE BY PHONE IS SET FOR THURSDAY, JANUARY 3, 2019 AT 9:30 A.M. IN 603. THE ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE ORDER FOR FULL DETAILS) JUDGE: CYNTHIA MING-MEI LEE, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, MATTER NOT REPORTED. (503/CML)

calendar.matters:
ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2019 Off Calendar

ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2018 Set For Trial On Jan-07-19 At 11:15 A.M. In Dept 503

MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Jan-14-2019 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-01-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE - TRIAL COURTS
Off Calendar Nov-16-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial, And Extending Discovery Cutoff (Added To Calendar For Tentative Ruling Entry Purposes Only)
Off Calendar Sep-20-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
(Mini-minutes continued from previous entry)

Further case management conference on November 21, 2018 at 1:30p.m. No need for any party to file any case management conference statement. Parties may appear at the conference by telephone. If the parties agree that no case management conference is necessary, they shall notify the Court at least two day prior to take the CMC off calendar.
Plaintiffs to make a settlement demand on defendants no later than November 22, 2018. Responses to the demand are due no later than December 7, 2018. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands stating their best and final offers. These confidential demands must be submitted to Commissioner Pang Ly via electronic mail by December 28, 2018 at 12:00p.m. Mandatory settlement conference with only the attorneys present and final decision makers available by phone is set for Thursday, January 3, 2019 at 9:30 a.m. in 603. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. (503/CML)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial, And Extending Discovery Cutoff
Off Calendar Sep-20-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kimberly Chu, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for Plaintiff
Laura Przetak of SPANOS | PRZETAK (510-250-0200), Designated Defense Counsel.

Plaintiffs' motion for preference is granted pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a). The trial date is Monday, January 7, 2019 at 11:15a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. 36(f) is January 18, 2019. Local Rule 20 shall be followed by the parties as well as all San Francisco Local Rules and California Rules of Court.
The last day for hearing summary judgment/adjudication motions is January 3, 2019. Summary judgment/adjudication motions shall be brought on regular notice pursuant to the relevant provisions of the C.C.P., unless the parties stipulate otherwise.
The Court will allow a maximum of four summary judgment/adjudication motions per day to be calendared in this action. Before a party files and serves such motion, it must contact the Court's Calendar Clerk to make a reservation.
Time to respond to written discovery that has not yet been served is shortened to 20 days. For written discovery that has already been served, responses are due within 20 days of this hearing or by the date determined by the C.C.P., whichever is earlier.
If there is any kind of issue/dispute that requires meet and confer, such meet and confer shall not be made via email or letter. It shall occur in person or via telephone.
Electronic service is considered the equivalent of personal service.
Fact discovery cut-off date is December 21, 2018. Expert discovery cut-off date is January 4, 2019.
All bankruptcy documents shall be turned over to defendants no later than October 19, 2018. If plaintiffs submit documents to bankruptcy trusts after this date, they must notify defendants of this no later than five days after submission. The fact discovery cut-off does not apply to bankruptcy documents.
No later than October 4, 2018 plaintiffs must provide a statement stating, as to each defendant, the name and contact information of each lay person with knowledge of any facts supporting any of plaintiffs' claims. No later than October 4, 2018 defendants must provide a statement stating the name and contact information of each lay person with knowledge of any facts supporting any of defendant's affirmative defenses. Any person not identified on the statements may be barred from testifying at trial or presenting a declaration on a summary motion absent good cause shown. (Minutes continued, see next entry)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial, And Extending Discovery Cutoff
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Continued To Sep-20-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopated: Plaintiff's motion for order granting preference in setting case for trial, and extending discovery cutoff is continued to September 20, 2018 at 9:30am in Department 503 upon the Court's own motion. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. (503/CML)
